_comment: Code health ratchet. Values can only decrease. Pre-commit hook fails if any metric exceeds its ceiling. See docs/engineering-philosophy.md.

counts._comment: Anti-pattern counts. Add metrics relevant to your stacks; remove ones that don't apply. Run `just audit auto-ratchet` to lock improvements after a cleanup PR.

file_ceilings._comment: Per-file line ceilings. Add a file here when refactoring to keep the gain locked in. Defaults are language-specific (see code-quality-audit skill for thresholds).

_max_file_ceilings_doc: Cap the number of files conceded to be too large. Increment only when you've split a file's concerns into a module dir; never when greasing CI.
